name: Feature Request / Content Suggestion
about: Suggest a new chapter, topic, or improvement

labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

## What would you like to see?

<!-- Describe the chapter, topic, or feature you'd like added -->

## Why is this valuable?

<!-- Explain how this would benefit learners -->

## Where should it go?

<!-- Suggest a location: new chapter, Extra Chapter, addition to existing chapter, etc. -->
- [ ] New main chapter
- [ ] Extra Chapter contribution
- [ ] Addition to an existing chapter (specify which)
- [ ] Code example
- [ ] Other

## Existing chapter: ___

## Do you want to contribute this yourself?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to write this
- [ ] No, I'm suggesting it for someone else to implement

## Additional context

<!-- Any references, papers, or examples that might help -->
